subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Hasan! In this moment this precious pearl hath appeared from the ocean of the knowledge of God, glorified be His majesty - the Day is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالحسن در این حین این لولو ثمین از بحر علم حق جل جلاله ظاهر قد اتی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
